facts_auth_519767721695.content: When auditing auth coverage, the actual code change may be minimal — the bulk of the effort is verification, not modification.

thoughts_srcapp_519769219022.content: A leftover 'my-route' placeholder file existed in the codebase and had to be deleted, highlighting that scaffold artifacts should be cleaned up before production.

facts_auth_519770699435.content: The /health and /csrf-token endpoints are intentionally left unprotected as they serve infrastructure and CSRF needs respectively.

conventions_auth_519771935568.content: All /api/* routes must use the `withAuth` HOC; exceptions are explicitly enumerated (health, csrf-token) rather than implicit.

facts_auth_519773329610.content: Auth audit tasks should first enumerate all routes and then compare against protection status, making deletion the simplest fix when a route shouldn't exist at all.
